title: Track Complaint Status
intro: Enter your unique reference number to securely check the status and updates of your submitted complaint.
subject: Subject

progress.label: Overall progress
progress.errorHint: We could not find this reference. Check the number and try again.

received.title: Complaint received
received.body: Your complaint enters the MoPD system with a reference number.

review.title: Under review
review.body: MoPD reviews your submission and assigns it to the responsible team.

investigation.title: In investigation
investigation.body: Staff investigate the case, prepare a response, and complete internal review.

response.title: Response issued
response.body: You receive MoPD's response and may provide feedback or request an appeal.

statusDetail.SUBMITTED: Your complaint is registered in our system. A reference number has been issued so you can track progress here.
statusDetail.TRIAGE: MoPD is reviewing your submission, checking details, and deciding how your complaint should be handled.
statusDetail.ASSIGNED: Your complaint has been assigned to a responsible MoPD team or officer. They will take the next steps on your case.
statusDetail.IN_INVESTIGATION: Assigned staff are examining the facts and details of your complaint.
statusDetail.DRAFT_RESPONSE: MoPD is preparing a formal written response to your complaint.
statusDetail.QA_LEGAL_REVIEW: The draft response is being reviewed for quality and legal compliance before it is issued to you.
statusDetail.RESPONSE_ISSUED: MoPD has issued a formal response. Please review the outcome communicated to you.
statusDetail.AWAITING_FEEDBACK: MoPD is waiting for your feedback on the response. Your input may help close or continue the case.
statusDetail.APPEAL: An appeal or further review has been registered. Your complaint is being re-examined by MoPD.
statusDetail.CLOSED: This complaint is closed. No further routine updates are expected unless a separate appeal process still applies.

appealGuidance.title: Disagree with the outcome?
appealGuidance.bodyBeforeEmail: If you wish to appeal or request further review, email
appealGuidance.contactLink: contact us through our contact page

errors.title: Unable to load tracking
errors.notFound: No complaint found for that reference. Check the number and try again.
errors.generic: Could not load tracking information. Please try again.
